title: orchis purpurea var. stenoloba
intro: Orchis purpurea var. stenoloba, commonly known as the pale-spurred orchid, is a subspecies of the wild orchid species Orchis purpurea, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional herbal remedies to treat respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Orchis purpurea var. stenoloba include its ability to alleviate coughs, relieve bronchitis, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
